name: Warqnaa V0.3.6+187 GitHub CI Secret and Composer Hotfix
scope: Remove secret-bearing .env files from the shippable tree and Git index
Add merge-safe environment and signing secret ignore rules
Synchronize phpunit/phpunit and mockery/mockery in Composer lock before install
Preserve existing composer install commands and CI contracts
Run release preflight and create clean FULL/PATCH archives
feature_policy: No gameplay, UI, assets, engines, economy, store, voice, social, admin, or progression feature is removed or replaced.
